title: Leadership in Turbulent Times
author: Doris Kearns Goodwin
subline: Four presidents. Four crises. The traits they shared.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <g transform="translate(160 1180)">
    <g transform="translate(0 0)">
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="240" height="700" fill="none" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="600" x2="240" y2="600" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1"/>
      <text x="120" y="650" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="18" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.18em">LINCOLN</text>
      <text x="120" y="678" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="400" fill="#fc1c46" opacity="0.7" letter-spacing="0.18em">CIVIL WAR</text>
    </g>
    <g transform="translate(290 0)">
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="240" height="700" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="600" x2="240" y2="600" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
      <text x="120" y="650" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="18" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.18em">T. ROOSEVELT</text>
      <text x="120" y="678" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="400" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">COAL STRIKE</text>
    </g>
    <g transform="translate(580 0)">
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="240" height="700" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="600" x2="240" y2="600" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
      <text x="120" y="650" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="18" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.18em">FDR</text>
      <text x="120" y="678" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="400" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">DEPRESSION</text>
    </g>
    <g transform="translate(870 0)">
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="240" height="700" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="600" x2="240" y2="600" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
      <text x="120" y="650" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="18" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.18em">LBJ</text>
      <text x="120" y="678" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="400" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">CIVIL RIGHTS</text>
    </g>
  </g>
  <g transform="translate(160 1900)" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" fill="#4c4c4c">
    <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="1110" y2="0" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <g font-size="13" font-weight="500" letter-spacing="0.18em" text-anchor="middle">
      <text x="120" y="30">1860</text>
      <text x="410" y="30">1902</text>
      <text x="700" y="30">1933</text>
      <text x="990" y="30">1963</text>
    </g>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: Four portrait frames in a row — Lincoln / T. Roosevelt / FDR / LBJ — each labeled with the crisis that defined their presidency. Lincoln's frame is RED 2px; the others are graphite 1px. A timeline below marks the 100-year arc. Title is 280px mixed case, three lines. The composition reads as a presidential pantheon mounted on a wall.
